\tzpentry{ID3661}{Channel Fibonacci Charge Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3661 introduces Channel Fibonacci Charge Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{Q}_{\text{channel}}^{(n)} = \mathcal{Q}_0 \times F_n \times \exp\left[-\frac{E_n}{k_BT}\right] \times \left(1 + \int_0^t e^{-\tau/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau\right) \end{equation}
